zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers於1445年出生在英國蘇格蘭維托史爾莫申盧姆時，她的父親Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers22歲，母親Mary Herries6歲。她和Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1486年7月14日在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾特拉華爾享年41歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers于1445年出生在英国苏格兰維托史爾莫申盧姆时，她的父亲Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers22岁，母亲Mary Herries6岁。她和Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1486年7月14日在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾特拉華爾享年41岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers was born in 1445, in Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers, was 22 and her mother, Mary Herries, was 6. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies. She died on 14 July 1486, in Traquair, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Traquhair, Peeblesshire, Scotland: Traquair, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers est née en 1445, à Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mary Herries, avait 6 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies. Elle est décédée le 14 juillet 1486, à Traquair, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers 1445 in Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers 22 und ihre Mutter Mary Herries 6. Sie hatte mit Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Juli 1486 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Traquair, Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers è nata il nel 1445 nel Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mary Herries, aveva 6 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies. Morì il 14 luglio 1486, nel Traquair, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Douglas of Caversが1445年にイギリススコットランドウィグトウンシュアイアモチルムで生まれた時，父Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Caversは22歳，母Mary Herriesは6歳であった。彼女はSir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garliesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1486年7月14日にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアトラクアで41歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers(이)가 1445년 영국 스코틀랜드 위그타운실르 모크럼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Herries(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 7월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 트라퀄어에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers nasceu em 1445, em Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mary Herries, tinha 6 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies. Ela faleceu em 14 de julho de 1486, em Traquair, Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers родилась в 1445 г. в местности мочрум, вигтоуншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Herries, 6. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies. Она умерла 14 июля 1486 г. в местности тракуеир, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Douglas of Cavers nació en 1445, en Mochrum, Wigtownshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mary Herries, tenía 6 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir Alexandert Stewart 3rd Laird of Dalswinton and Garlies. Murió el 14 de julio de 1486, en Traquair, Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Escocia, Reino Unido.
